text: The dashboard update pipeline is: poller (daily at 06:00 UTC) → provider fetch (SearchAPI then Apify) → upsert to Supabase → build cache → SSE broadcast to all connected clients. The poller uses isFetchInFlight() as a mutex to prevent concurrent fetches. SSE clients auto-reconnect in 10s via the retry directive. The /dashboard/refresh endpoint triggers an immediate out-of-schedule fetch. Q2 reviews (positive/negative) will be 0 until April 1 when the trimester begins.
